overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rainy, dark forest environment. The character moves from a wooden lakeside dock past a rustic house and into a dense forest trail with mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock on rainy lake

events.description: approaching the wooden lakeside house from the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden dock toward a lakeside hut in heavy rain, passing a villager on the left

notable_agents.action: villager in yellow clothing standing on the dock looking at the water
person standing near the house entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the lakeside dock
dark choppy water of the lake
rustic wooden house with stone chimney and blue door
dense pine trees surrounding the lake shoreline
small wooden boat moored near the dock

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy lakeside dock where Geralt walks toward a rustic wooden fishing hut. The planks are weathered and wet from the rain, with dark choppy water visible to the left. Two NPCs are present - one villager in yellow stands on the dock looking at the water, while another figure waits near the house entrance. Dense evergreen forests surround the lake in the background.

events.description: leaving the wooden dock and house behind, stepping onto dirt forest path
forest opens up to reveal misty mountain peaks in the distance

agents.ego_description: trekking steadily along the muddy forest trail through heavy rain, with mountains becoming visible ahead

entered.detail: muddy trail winding through the forest with patches of grass
low mossy stone wall lining the initial part of the path
misty mountain visible through gaps in the trees
decaying logs and stumps on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the lakeside structures behind, the character enters a dense forest trail. The ground changes from wooden planks to muddy dirt as stone walls briefly line the path. The forest becomes increasingly dense with towering pines, while misty mountain peaks become visible through the trees in the distance. Fallen logs and stumps dot the forest floor as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy lakeside settlement into the depths of a dense, misty forest. It begins on a weathered wooden dock where Geralt walks past a villager in yellow toward a rustic fishing hut, with dark, choppy water churning to the left. As the character leaves the lakeside structures behind, the ground shifts from wet planks to a muddy dirt trail lined briefly by stone walls. The scene then expands into a thick grove of towering pines and fallen logs, where the rain continues to fall. Finally, the path pushes deeper into the wilderness as misty mountain peaks emerge through the gaps in the dense evergreen canopy.
